name: Save Point
description: Comforting checkpoint chimes with warm reassurance

prompts.SessionStart: calm checkpoint chiptune ascending with warm save-state melody, 8-bit save tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: checkpoint chiptune descending with smooth save-state resolution, 8-bit save tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: satisfying save-complete chiptune chime with bright confirmation ring, 8-bit save tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick save-state chiptune tick with crisp checkpoint click, 8-bit save tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short save-confirmed chiptune chirp with bright checkpoint ping, 8-bit save tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two save-state chiptune tones with questioning checkpoint rise, 8-bit save tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady save-point chiptune loop with clear checkpoint rhythm, 8-bit save tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: save-point chiptune forking into two parallel checkpoint voices, 8-bit save tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear save-point chiptune ping returning with bright checkpoint ring, 8-bit save tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright save-state chiptune burst with energetic checkpoint attack, 8-bit save tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
